primary_text:
2,000+ families already shop with FarmThru. They collect fresh regenerative food from their local hub every week. They know their farmers by name.

Now they can own a piece of it too.

In July 2026, FarmThru is opening equity crowdfunding on Birchal. From $50, capped at $10K.

This isn't just a grocery store. It's a community rebuilding the connection between farms and families. And now you can help build it.

Not financial advice.
headline: 2,000+ families. Now they can invest
description: FarmThru equity crowdfunding on Birchal, July 2026. From $50.
creative_brief: Collage of real customer moments at the hub: collecting bags, chatting. Warm, community feel. Overlay: '2,000+ families' in confident type.
